shapes.action.left.command:
from BatchGUI import BatchGUI
GUT = BatchGUI()
GUT.showWindow()

try:

    DIRPT = DIRDirveUI()
    DIRPT.mainWindow()
except:
    import HelpImageUI as Hint
    Hint.denyUserAccess()

joint_mod_layout.main()

from py_rigAssit.dialogs import ikfk_system_layout as ikfk_system
ikfk_system.main()

from py_rigAssit.dialogs import rename_dialog as rename_dialog
rename_dialog.main()

from JointEdit.JointEditFun import EditJnt
editJnt = EditJnt()
editJnt.create_copySkinWeight()

from JointEdit.JointEditFun import EditJnt

editJnt.resetSelectSkinPose()

from Popumenus import GUIPopupMenu
popupMenu = GUIPopupMenu()
popupMenu._select_attr_input_node()

from GeneralTools.AttributeSetting import SetAttrTool
setTool = SetAttrTool()
setTool.add_follow_attr()

from JointEdit.JointEditFun import EditJnt
editJnt = EditJnt()
editJnt.Toparent()

import maya.cmds as cmds
if not cmds.pluginInfo('ngSkinTools2', q=True, l=True):
    cmds.loadPlugin('ngSkinTools2')

import ngSkinTools2
ngSkinTools2.open_ui()

import maya.cmds as cmds, maya.mel as mel
if not cmds.pluginInfo('brSmoothWeights', q=True, l=True):
    cmds.loadPlugin('brSmoothWeights')
mel.eval("brSmoothWeightsToolCtx; toolPropertyWindow;")

import maya.mel as mel
import saveRootPath as Root
user_path = Root.ParentPath.replace("\\", "/")
mel.eval('source "{}scripts/mel/great_curvejoint.mel"; '.format(user_path))

import maya.mel as mel
import saveRootPath as Root
user_path = Root.ParentPath.replace("\\", "/")
mel.eval('source "{}scripts/mel/Insertjoint_selected.mel"; pyFitResampleUI'.format(user_path))
